title: Hemis National Park
tagline: Hemis National Park — wildlife reserve of Ladakh (UT)

overview.short: Hemis National Park, a high-elevation national park near Hemis in the Leh district of Ladakh in India, is located 50 km (31 mi) from Leh town, the capitals of Ladakh.
overview.description: Hemis National Park, a high-elevation national park near Hemis in the Leh district of Ladakh in India, is located 50 km (31 mi) from Leh town, the capitals of Ladakh. Globally famous for its endangered snow leopards, it has the highest density of them in any protected area in the world. The park is also home to a number of other endangered mammal species. It is one of the three largest wildlife sanctuaries in Ladakh, others being Karakoram Wildlife Sanctuary, and Changthang Cold Desert Wildlife Sanctuary.

topPlaces.name: Stok Kangri
topPlaces.description: Stok Kangri (6,153 metres (20,187 ft)) is the highest mountain in the Stok Range of the Zazkar Mountains a Trans-Himalayan mountain in the Ladakh region of north India. The peak is located in Hemis National Park, 12 km southwest of the trailhead (3,610 metres (11,844 ft)) in the village of Stok and around 15 km southwest of the city of Leh, the capital of Ladakh.

topPlaces.name: Rumbak
topPlaces.description: Rumbak is a village in the Sham district of Ladakh, India. It is located in the Likir tehsil and lies within Hemis National Park.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hemis National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hemis National Park is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hemis National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kushok Bakula Rimpochee Airport, Leh (20 km) and the nearest railway station is Katra (Vaishno Devi railhead) (256 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hemis National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hemis National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hemis National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Hemis National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hemis National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Stok Kangri, Rumbak.
